2026-04-22NRCANCanadian Energy Regulator ActOrder directing the issue of a Certificate of Public Convenience and Necessity to Westcoast Energy Inc. Order directing the Commission of the Canadian Energy Regulator to issue a certificate of public convenience and necessity to Westcoast Energy Inc. in order to expand the Sunrise Program Project subject to 47 conditions.N/A
subject: Order directing the issue of a Certificate of Public Convenience and Necessity to Westcoast Energy Inc.
precis: Order directing the Commission of the Canadian Energy Regulator to issue a certificate of public convenience and necessity to Westcoast Energy Inc. in order to expand the Sunrise Program Project subject to 47 conditions.
